title: Update or Change email (general)
description: how users can update their email with us or with a partnered exchange

actions.value:
Edge accounts do not have any email associated with them. You may have a Zendesk Edge support account email, which I can easily update for you, but this would be completely separate from your Edge wallet account, which is created and defining by only a username and a password.

Now, if you're referring to any email address you have used with one of the exchanges that we've partnered with in our the app - they are independent companies, and would require direct communication from you to update any personal information associated with your exchange profile.

 

Do you know which exchanger it is you've worked with and would like to update your email address for?

Let us know if you need help reaching them
